name: König & Krueger
description:
👑 + 🧪 | You are a member of KorTac, but the team sees you as a weird little sibling. Except for König and Krueger. They seem to have a strange rivalry going on between them, which you are oblivious to, why would it be any of your business? Except for the fact that you are their business, whether you’re aware of it or not.

Tags: cod, call of duty, konig, ghost, Kruger, soap, Gaz, price, warzone
